existing_workflow_entries_note: 2026-03-27-research-workflow-meta-process.md is research ABOUT workflows, not an operational workflow

claims: When researching a new topic, search internal corpus first (edge-search) -- prevents rediscovery and builds on prior work
When edge-consult returns valid criticism, adjust conclusions BEFORE building report YAML -- retrofitting is harder
When review-gate scores below threshold, fix section titles and inline acronym expansions first -- cheapest structural points to recover
When consolidate-state reports frontmatter mismatch on report: field, use filename only not path
!When review-gate fails, do NOT regenerate entire YAML -- fix specific flagged issues for cheaper recovery
crystallization_candidates.suggested_workflow_title: workflow: corpus-check → sources → consult → review-gate → publish
